mapper.insert: insert into space (host_id, title, description, address, price_per_hour, capacity) values (#{hostId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{address}, #{pricePerHour}, #{capacity})
mapper.select: select s.id as s_id , s.host_id , s.title , s.description , s.address , s.price_per_hour , s.capacity , si.id as si_id , si.space_id , si.image_url , si.is_main from space s left join space_image si on s.id = si.space_id and si.is_deleted = 0 where s.id = #{id} and s.is_deleted = 0

select s.id as s_id , s.host_id as hostId , s.title as title , s.description as description , s.address as address , s.price_per_hour as pricePerHour , s.capacity as capacity , si.id as si_id , si.space_id , si.image_url , si.is_main from space s left join space_image si on s.id = si.space_id and si.is_main = 1 and si.is_deleted = 0 where s.host_id = #{hostId} and s.is_deleted = 0 order by s.id desc

select s.id as s_id, s.host_id, s.title, s.description, s.address, s.price_per_hour, s.capacity, si.id as si_id, si.space_id, si.image_url, si.is_main from space s left join space_image si on s.id = si.space_id and si.is_main = 1 and si.is_deleted = 0 where s.is_deleted = 0 order by s.id desc limit #{limit}

select count(*) from space where is_deleted = 0
and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or address like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
